bird.name: Basic Bird
bird.flavor: They say his name is Bob

bird.name: Intern Bird
bird.descr: When fired, you can return this bird to your hand.
bird.flavor: A bird that just can't get enough experience

bird.name: Night Shift Bird
bird.descr: When hired, draw 1 card and fire this bird.

bird.name: Dismissal
bird.descr: Fire any lvl 1 penguin on the field.

bird.name: Cubicle
bird.descr: During pay phase, each adjacent penguin earns an extra $1.

bird.name: Number 2 pencil
bird.descr: Earn $1 for every bird in your zone.

bird.name: Undo
bird.descr: Remove a card in your zone.

crime.name: Bandit Bird
crime.descr: During main phase, you can steal $1 from an opponent.

crime.name: Sabotage Bird
crime.descr: Before main phase, place 1 token on this bird. During main phase, you can remove all tokens from this bird to fire another opponents bird that has the same level or below the number of tokens removed, and gain money equal to the level of that bird.

crime.name: Switchblade
crime.descr: When an opponent hires a bird, earn money equal to it's level and flip it face-down.

crime.name: Failed robbery
crime.descr: Fire all birds in your zone with a level less than 0.
